name: Rice with Peas and Whole Spices
recipeIngredient: 2 cups rice, long grain or basmati
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a 3-quart pot over medium heat.
2. Add the spices and fry for 10-20 seconds, stirring occasionally.
3. Add the rice and stir to coat with the oil and spices.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients except the peas, bringing the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat, cover tightly, and cook over low heat for about 25 minutes.
6. Add the defrosted peas to the top of the rice and cover again for about 5 minutes.
7. Gently mix the rice and peas together and serve.
8. Serve with yogurt and chopped tomatoes, salt, and pepper. This dish pairs well with Koftas.
Per serving: 107 Calories; 8g Fat (64% calories from fat); 2g Protein; 9g Carbohydrate; 0mg Cholesterol; 445mg Sodium
